name: Gaming Setup
description: A basic gaming environment blueprint with launchers, GPU companion tools, monitoring, and communication apps.

apps.reason: Primary PC game library and launcher.
Optional launcher for Epic game library.
Useful for NVIDIA driver and settings workflows.
Optional frame-time capture and analysis tool.
Common voice chat and community app.

config_recommendations: Keep game libraries on a disk with enough free space.
Disable unnecessary overlays if performance or stability is poor.
Use monitoring tools first before attempting any tuning.
risk_warnings: Launchers and overlays can consume background resources.
Overclocking or undervolting should be done manually and carefully.
not_recommended: Running many launchers at startup on low-RAM systems.
next_steps: Install only the launchers you actually use.
Check GPU driver status manually from official sources.
Benchmark one game before and after major settings changes.
